final:
module ArithmeticOp(
    input [7:0] a,
    input [7:0] b,
    output reg [15:0] result
);

always @ (*)
begin
    result = (a * b) + (a + b);
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (a == 8'd0 && b == 8'd0) begin
        result <= 16'd0;
      end else begin
        result <= 16'd1;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
